query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS closureAuditLog (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  closureId INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('created', 'confirmed', 'deleted') NOT NULL,
  performedBy INT NOT NULL,
  actionDetails JSON,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (closureId) REFERENCES accountingClosures(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (performedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_closureId_idx (closureId),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_performedBy_idx (performedBy),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_action_idx (action),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_timestamp_idx (timestamp)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  closureId INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('created', 'confirmed', 'deleted') NOT NULL,
  performedBy INT NOT NULL,
  actionDetails JSON,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (closureId) REFERENCES accountingClosures(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (performedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_closureId_idx (closureId),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_performedBy_idx (performedBy),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_action_idx (action),
  INDEX closureAuditLog_timestamp_idx (timestamp)
);
